## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] pnpm lint
- [ ] pnpm test
- [ ] pnpm audit

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated when needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
